steps.title: Spot the scale contrast and its measurement
steps.content: The passage contrasts effects at different scales: individual consumers experience “strong” effects, while at the national level, effects are “often quite ______.” The example—GDP moved “only slightly greater than zero”—specifies what this national effect is: minimal and muted.

steps.title: Match the meaning to the answer
steps.content:
“Subdued” means toned down or muted, exactly matching the minimal magnitude shown by “only slightly greater than zero.” The other choices describe different dimensions: persistent (duration), beneficial (quality), and variable (consistency).
That matches choice B — B is correct.
